author: han0110
content: EL is only used for fetching the execution witness by zkboost, and zkboost convert it to zkVM input for different `proof_type`, so it's expected to work I think.

author: taulepton_
content: Let me know if you have any problems

author: chotuchaiwala
content: No issues till now, I had el set to reth and saw ethrex-zisk and reth-zisk both generating proofs just fine and wanted to clear that up that's expected behaviour
